name: Anti-Malware on Systems in CDE
description: Ensures anti-malware software is deployed on all systems in the cardholder data environment (PCI DSS 5.1)
query: SELECT id, hostname, os_type, antimalware_installed, cde_scope FROM endpoints WHERE cde_scope = true AND (antimalware_installed = false OR antimalware_installed IS NULL)
remediation: Deploy anti-malware software on all systems commonly affected by malware in the CDE.
